title: The Man From The Fog
description: A horror mod that adds a creature stalking you
body:
[![mado hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d134c13be5c38e90820569398ca9c692afd3e0.png)](https://www.mado-hosting.com)

# The Man From The Fog

This mod adds a creature to Minecraft that appears in the Night and stalks you.
Eventually it will start to chase you kill you. In the config you can change these options:

```
  "spawn_rate": "normal",             ->  options - often, normal, rare
  "jumpscare": true,
  "max_chase_duration": 1000,         -> in ticks
  "min_chase_duration": 400,          -> in ticks
  "climbing": true,
  "vanish_distance": 30,              -> The distance from you to the man until it despawns
  "spawn_at_day": false,
  "darkness_effect": true,
  "all_dimensions": false,
  "break_blocks": true
```

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/mproductions) for leaks and updates
 

### GECKOLIB MOD IS REQUIRED!
